mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, content, image_urls, tags, view_count, like_count, share_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.ablecisi.ailovebacked.handler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.ablecisi.ailovebacked.handler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{shareCount}, #{commentCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET user_id = #{userId}, content = #{content}, image_urls = #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.ablecisi.ailovebacked.handler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=com.ablecisi.ailovebacked.handler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, share_count = #{shareCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(comment_count, 0) - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(like_count, 0) - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET share_count = IFNULL(share_count, 0) + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
